use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for landing pages and marketing sites
Full-viewport animated backgrounds for SaaS dashboards
Decorative background layers for portfolio and creative websites
Visual polish for fintech and e-commerce product showcases
Atmospheric backgrounds for media and entertainment platforms
ai_summary: A full-viewport animated aurora gradient background component with smooth color transitions across blue, indigo, violet, and blue-300 hues. Features CSS-only animations creating a flowing aurora borealis effect with radial gradient support, blur effects, and dark mode compatibility. Perfect for creating immersive hero sections and decorative page backgrounds.
